class.name: PlayFabPartyNetworkStateChange
class.description: Surfaced by [signal PlayFabPartyNetwork.state_changed]. Wraps the change kind, the affected network, an optional [PlayFabResult], the participating [PlayFabUser], the related Godot peer id, the new network state (see [enum PlayFabParty.NetworkState]), and a human-readable reason.

method.name: get_network
method.description: Returns the network associated with the change.

method.name: get_result
method.description: Returns the optional [PlayFabResult] for the change.

method.name: get_peer_id
method.description: Returns the Godot peer id associated with the change, or [code]0[/code] if not applicable.

method.name: get_state
method.description: Returns the new network state. See [enum PlayFabParty.NetworkState].

method.name: get_reason
method.description: Returns the human-readable reason for the change.

members.member: Godot peer id associated with the change.
